login.subtitle: Sign in to continue.

dashboard.subtitle: Platform administration for life.

dashboard.recentProducts.description: The latest products in the global catalog.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage backoffice access and your team's roles.
users.actions.label: Actions
users.create.title: Create user
users.create.subtitle: Add a member and assign them a role.
users.create.name: Full name
users.create.inviteHint: The user will receive a link to set their password.
users.roles.title: Edit permissions
users.roles.subtitle: Assign at most one level per domain.
users.ban.title: Ban this user?
users.ban.subtitle: Backoffice access is revoked immediately. You can reactivate them at any time.
users.activate.title: Reactivate this user?
users.activate.subtitle: The user will regain backoffice access with their previous roles.
users.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
users.error.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
common.col.name: Name
errors.forbidden.title: Access denied
errors.forbidden.description: You don't have the permissions required to view this page. Contact an administrator if you think this is a mistake.
errors.generic.title: Something went wrong
errors.generic.description: We couldn't load this data. Please try again.
users.roles.hint: At most one level per domain.
users.error.CannotDemoteSelfError: You can’t change your own role in a domain where you already have one.
users.error.RoleAssignmentDeniedError: You can only assign roles within domains you manage, at or below your own level.
reset.brandTagline: Protected access, at all times. Take back control of your account in a few steps.
reset.request.title: Forgot your password?
reset.request.subtitle: Enter your account's email address. We'll send you a link to reset your password.
reset.sent.title: Check your inbox
reset.sent.bodyPrefix: If an account is associated with
reset.sent.bodySuffix: , you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.
reset.sent.note: Remember to check your spam folder. The link expires in 60 minutes.
reset.reset.title: New password
reset.reset.subtitle: Choose a new password: 8 to 20 characters, with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number and a special character.
reset.strength.label: Strength:
reset.done.title: Password updated
reset.done.body: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in with your new credentials.
reset.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reset.error.InvalidPasswordResetTokenErr: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
